info.title: Composer Trading API
info.description: API to live trade against symphonies

post.summary: Enqueue a rebalancing dry run for all accounts

200.description: Returns market hours schedule for the upcoming week

get.description: Returns trading hours for the current day and the next week. Includes regular market hours, extended hours, and holidays.

get.summary: Get metadata for symphonies which have new invests pending
Get all deploy details for this account
get.description: Gets details of all deploys, with the same caveats as getting a single deploy.

parameters.name: deploy-id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the deployment operation

get.description: Gets details of a deploy. Pending invests may lack a position ID for new positions, while liquidations and account rebalances won't have a cash change, and account rebalances won't have a position or symphony ID.

parameters.name: deploy-id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the deployment operation

deploy_time.description: The auto rebalance deploy's scheduled time, if creating one was necessary.

amount.description: Amount of cash to invest or withdraw (in USD)

post.description: Add additional capital to a Symphony position. The investment will be queued and executed during the next rebalancing window.

deploy_time.description: The auto rebalance deploy's scheduled time, if creating one was necessary.

amount.description: Amount of cash to invest or withdraw (in USD)

post.description: Withdraw capital from a Symphony position. The withdrawal will be queued and executed during the next rebalancing window.
Toggle whether the Symphony should skip its next automated rebalancing cycle. Useful for temporarily pausing automated trading.

post.summary: Sell all assets in a symphony, leaving proceeds in cash. Cancels any existing queued invest/withdraw deploys for the symphony.
Liquidate a symphony entirely. Cancels any existing queued invest/withdraw deploys for the symphony.
Dry run rebalances for a specific user (all accounts, unless otherwise specified)

adjusted_for_dtbp.description: Whether buys in the preview were constrained by DTBP.

post.summary: Generate trade preview for a single symphony

get.summary: Get the trading period for a user

200.description: Returns a list of order requests for the account

client_order_ids.description: IDs of broker orders that have been submitted for this order request.

position_intent.description: The intent of the order request, only for options contracts.

options_details.description: Details of the options contract (only for OPTIONS assets)

strike_price.description: Strike price of the option contract.

expiry.description: Expiry date of the option contract.

contract_type.description: Type of option contract, CALL or PUT.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Single status or comma-separated list of statuses (e.g., 'QUEUED,OPEN,IN_PROGRESS')

get.description: Retrieve all order requests for a brokerage account. Returns both pending and completed orders with their current status.

notional.description: Required if quantity is not provided.

quantity.description: Required if notional is not provided.

position_intent.description: Required if the symbol is an option contract.

client_order_id.description: Optional client-generated order ID, for order tracking and idempotency.

post.description: Submit a new buy or sell order for equities or options. If the request is made outside of market hours, it will be queued and executed at the next market open.

estimated_cost.description: Deprecated: use estimated_total instead. Estimated total cost to execute the order (including commission). NOTE this is always positive; both a sell and a buy will have a positive estimated cost. More of an `estimated_total`.

estimated_total.description: Estimated total to execute the order (including commission). NOTE this is always positive; both a sell and a buy will have a positive estimated total.

required_collateral.description: List of assets required as collateral to place the order. Only unallocated account cash and DEFAULT_DIRECT position holdings are considered.

has_sufficient_collateral.description: Whether the account has sufficient cash and the DEFAULT_DIRECT position has sufficient holdings to place the order.

price_per_unit.description: Estimated price of contract (per share of underlying asset).

breakeven_price.description: Price of the underlying share at which the contract will break even.

max_profit.description: Maximum theoretical profit per underlying share (number or "INFINITY").

max_loss.description: Maximum theoretical loss per underlying share (number or "INFINITY").

estimated_cost.description: Deprecated: use estimated_total instead. Estimated total cost to execute the order (including commission). NOTE this is always positive; both a sell and a buy will have a positive estimated cost. More of an `estimated_total`.

estimated_total.description: Estimated total to execute the order (including commission). NOTE this is always positive; both a sell and a buy will have a positive estimated total.

required_collateral.description: List of assets required as collateral to place the order. Only unallocated account cash and DEFAULT_DIRECT position holdings are considered.

has_sufficient_collateral.description: Whether the account has sufficient cash and the DEFAULT_DIRECT position has sufficient holdings to place the order.

price_per_unit.description: Estimated price of contract (per share of underlying asset).

breakeven_price.description: Price of the underlying share at which the contract will break even.

max_profit.description: Maximum theoretical profit per underlying share (number or "INFINITY").

max_loss.description: Maximum theoretical loss per underlying share (number or "INFINITY").

notional.description: Required if quantity is not provided.

quantity.description: Required if notional is not provided.

position_intent.description: Required if the symbol is an option contract.

post.summary: Preview an order request - for option trades only

client_order_ids.description: IDs of broker orders that have been submitted for this order request.

position_intent.description: The intent of the order request, only for options contracts.

options_details.description: Details of the options contract (only for OPTIONS assets)

strike_price.description: Strike price of the option contract.

expiry.description: Expiry date of the option contract.

contract_type.description: Type of option contract, CALL or PUT.

parameters.name: order-request-id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the order request

get.summary: Return information about a single order request

parameters.name: order-request-id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the order request

delete.summary: Cancel an order request that has not executed yet
delete.description: If the order request has already executed, it cannot be canceled. Only QUEUED or OPEN order requests can be canceled.

parameters.name: order-request-id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the order request

client_order_id.description: The ID for the replacement order. Serves as an idempotency key.

patch.summary: Modify an existing order request that has not executed yet
patch.description: If the order request has already executed, it cannot be modified. Only QUEUED or OPEN order requests can be modified.

quantity.description: Quantity of contracts to be exercised.

estimated_profit.description: Total estimated profit (or loss) that would result from exercise).

assets_delivered.description: List of assets (cash and/or shares) to be delivered by the exerciser.

assets_received.description: List of assets (cash and/or shares) to be received by the exerciser.

affected_symphonies.description: List of symphonies from which assets would be taken to provide assets_delivered (if any).

reasons_preventing_exercise.description: List of reasons preventing exercise (if any).

post.summary: Preview exercise of an option contract position.
